creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 3 Sep 2001 11:52:13 -0700 (PDT), Will Andrews wrote:
>
> >Description:
> 
> KDE 2.x is attaining fruition with the latest release.  Many apps that
> were previously only found in KDE 1.x have since moved to 2.x.  Therefore
> the KDE FreeBSD team should coordinate a full removal of KDE 1.x from
> the FreeBSD ports tree after FreeBSD 4.4-RELEASE.
> 
> Same goes for QT 1.x.

While I agree with you regarding KDE 1.x, I think that we can keep
QT 1.4x for some more time, because there are some packages that never
had been updated to work with QT 2.x. After all, maintaining one port
(i.e. QT 1.4x) is not going to be a resource-consuming task, so I
would like to suggest to keep it "just in the case."

-Maxim
